name: vercel-ai-syntax-code
title: Syntax Code
author: Vercel
description: Asynchronous syntax highlighting with line numbers, language selection, and copy controls.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Replaced the collision-prone abbreviated token cache key with the complete language and source pair.
Changed physical spacing utilities to logical equivalents for RTL.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Replaced the collision-prone abbreviated token cache key with the complete language and source pair. Changed physical spacing utilities to logical equivalents for RTL.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
